results.question: What is EasyMart's return window for purchased items?
results.ground_truth: 30 days from the date of purchase
results.answer:
# EasyMart Return Window

Thank you for your question! I'm happy to help.

**EasyMart's return window is 30 days from when your order arrives at your door.** We count from your delivery date rather than your order date, which gives you plenty of time to inspect and decide if you're completely satisfied with your purchase.

## To qualify for a return, your items must be:
- ✓ Unused and in new condition
- ✓ In original packaging with all tags attached
- ✓ Include any accessories or materials that came with the product

## Important to note:
Some items are **not returnable**, including:
- Clearance items
- Perishables
- Personalized products

If you'd like to initiate a return within the 30-day window, you can log into your EasyMart account and navigate to "My Orders," or

﻿# EasyMart Return Policy

## Overview
We want you to love every purchase! If you're not completely satisfied, we're here to help.

## Return Window
You have **30 days from your purchase date** to initiate a return. We count from when your order arrives at your door, not when you ordered it.

## Return Conditions
To qualify for a return, items must be:
- Unused and in new condition
- In original packaging and with all tags attached
- Include any accessories or materials that came with the produc

﻿# EasyMart Refund Policy

## Overview
At EasyMart, we stand behind our products. If you're not completely satisfied with your purchase, we offer a straightforward refund process to ensure your peace of mind.

## Full Refunds
Items in original, good condition are eligible for full refunds. Products must be unused, unwashed, and in resalable condition with all original tags and packaging intact. To initiate a return, contact our customer service team within 30 days of purchase.

## Refund Process

results.question: Can I return personalized or customized items at EasyMart?
results.ground_truth: No, personalized items are typically non-returnable
results.answer:
# Return Policy for Personalized or Customized Items

Thank you for your question! 

Unfortunately, **personalized or customized items cannot be returned at EasyMart**. This includes:
- Engraved products
- Monogrammed goods
- Other custom or personalized items

This is because personalized products are made specifically for you and cannot be resold to other customers.

## What You Can Return

Our standard 30-day return policy applies to most other items, as long as they are:
- Unused and in new condition
- In original packaging with all tags attached
- Include any accessories that came with the product

## Before You Order

If you're considering a personalized item, I'd recommend:
- Double-checking all customization details (spelling, initials, designs, etc.) before finalizing your purchase
- Reviewing product images carefully to ensure it meets your expectations

results.question: How long does it take for a refund to be processed at EasyMart?
results.ground_truth: 5-10 business days after the return is received
results.answer:
# EasyMart Refund Timeline

Thank you for your question! Here's how long you can expect your refund to take:

## Refund Processing Timeline

**After we receive your returned item:**
- **7-10 business days** to inspect and process your refund
- **Additional 3-5 business days** for the credit to appear in your account (depending on your financial institution)

**Total expected time:** Up to 15 business days from when we receive your return

## Important Notes:
- Your refund will be credited to your **original payment method**
- The timeline begins once your item arrives at our warehouse and is inspected
- Processing times may vary slightly depending on your bank or credit card company

## Need to Start a Return?
If you'd like to initiate a return, simply:
1. Log into your EasyMart account
2. Go to "My Orders"

results.question: What are EasyMart's shipping costs?
results.ground_truth: $5.99 for standard shipping, $12.99 for expedited shipping
results.answer:
# EasyMart Shipping Costs

Thank you for your question! Here's a breakdown of our shipping options:

## **Shipping Options & Costs:**

- **Standard Shipping:** $5.99
  - Delivery in 5-7 business days
  - *FREE on orders $50+*

- **Expedited Shipping:** $12.99
  - Guaranteed 2-3 business day delivery

## **Free Shipping**
Orders totaling **$50 or more** automatically qualify for complimentary standard shipping—no code needed!

## **Additional Information**
- Shipping costs are calculated at checkout based on your destination and selected method
- Every shipment includes a tracking number sent via email so you can monitor your package in real-time
- We also ship internationally to 100+ countries

Is there anything else you'd like to know about our shipping options?

Yes! EasyMart offers **free standard shipping on orders over $50**.

If you need your items faster, we also offer:

- **Overnight Shipping:** Available for next business day delivery

results.question: What is the maximum refund amount before escalation at EasyMart?
results.ground_truth: $150 is the maximum automatic refund without escalation
results.answer:
# EasyMart Refund Information

Thank you for your question! Based on our refund policy, here's what you need to know about refund amounts and escalation:

## Refund Thresholds

- **Refunds up to $150:** These are automatically processed without additional review, so no escalation is needed.

- **Refunds exceeding $150:** These require escalation to our support specialist team for verification and approval. Please note that escalated refunds may take additional time to process.

## Additional Details

For **partial refunds** on items with damage, excessive wear, or missing components, our inspection team will assess the condition and typically approve a refund ranging from **25-75% of the original purchase price**.

## Need Help?

If you have specific questions about your refund eligibility or would like to initiate a return, please contact our Customer Service team:

results.question: How does EasyMart handle shipping for international orders?

results.answer:
# International Shipping at EasyMart

Thank you for your question! I'm happy to help explain how we handle international orders.

**Here's what you need to know:**

✓ **Coverage:** Yes, we ship to over 100 countries worldwide!

✓ **Delivery Time:** International orders typically take **10-21 business days** depending on your destination country.

✓ **Processing:** Orders process within 1 business day (weekends and holidays excluded)

⚠️ **Important:** Please note that you'll be responsible for any applicable **customs duties and import taxes** that may be charged upon delivery.

- Exact shipping rates for your location
- More precise delivery timeframes
- Real-time shipping options

results.question: What should I do if my item arrives damaged?
results.ground_truth: You can request a partial or full refund depending on the damage
results.answer:
# What to Do If Your Item Arrives Damaged

I'm sorry to hear your item arrived damaged! Here's what you should do:

## Immediate Steps:
1. **Contact us within 14 days** with photos showing the damage as evidence
2. Our customer service team will review your case right away

## Your Options:
We'll take care of you with one of these solutions:
- **Free replacement** shipped at no cost to you, OR
- **Full refund** to your original payment method

## Good News:
- **No return shipping required** for damaged items—we'll either provide a prepaid return label or handle it another way
- You won't pay anything out of pocket

## Timeline:
- Refunds are processed within **5-7 business days** after we receive and inspect your return
- Allow an additional **3-5 business days** for your bank to show the credit

results.question: How long does standard delivery take at EasyMart?
results.answer:
# Standard Delivery at EasyMart

Thank you for your question! Our **Standard Shipping** typically takes **5-7 business days** for delivery.

Here are some additional details that might be helpful:

- **Processing time:** Orders process within 1 business day
- **Cost:** $5.99 (or **FREE on orders $50+**)
- **Timeline note:** Weekends and holidays are excluded from processing times
- **Special cases:** Remote areas may experience extended delivery times

If you need your items faster, we also offer **Expedited Shipping** for guaranteed **2-3 business day** delivery at $12.99.

**Is there anything else I can help you with today?** Feel free to reach out to our customer service team at support@EasyMart.com if you have additional questions!

results.question: Can I exchange an item instead of returning it for a refund?
results.ground_truth: Yes, EasyMart offers exchange requests as an alternative to returns
results.answer:
# Yes, You Can Exchange!

Great question! Yes, absolutely—**exchanges are free at EasyMart!** 

If you'd prefer a different size or color instead of returning for a refund, here's how it works:

✓ **Select "Exchange" during checkout** instead of "Return"
✓ **We'll send your replacement first** before we even ask for the original item back
✓ **No exchange fee**—it's completely free!

This is a convenient option if you just need a different size or color of the same item.

## Need Help?
If you have any questions about exchanging your item or need assistance with the process, feel free to:
- **Contact us at:** support@EasyMart.com
- **Use our live chat** for immediate assistance

Our friendly support team is here to help! 😊
